violations.text: Establishment is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2026

Ambient temperature of the grab n go unit was observed held at 45 degrees Fahrenheit. Unit had been accidently turned off over the weekend and was turned on this morning. Cheese and pulled pork had been in this unit over the weekend and was voluntarily disposed of during inspection. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026

Various breads, cheese, and pulled pork, packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Foods were removed from shelf to be labeled. Resource provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026

The door to the outside, located at the back of the establishment, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Utensils must be stored in a clean, dry location. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026

Utensils observed displayed with the lip surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/28/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the bar and in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

The floor and wall junctures in the warewashing room do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2026

An area of the basement where food service materials are stored, does not have proper ceiling and wall surfaces. Items to be moved to the opposite side of the basement until ceiling and walls can be surfaced with proper materials. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2026

The door to the outside, located at the back of the establishment, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026

Dishwasher located at the bar was not in good repair. It is not currently reaching proper sanitizing temperature. Establishment is to use the kitchen dishwasher or 3-bay sink to sanitize until dishwasher is reaching proper sanitizing temperature. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwasher in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026
The floor and wall junctures do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 02/09/2026
